scripts.coverage:pkg: c8 --include="pkg/**/*.js" --exclude="tests-js/**" --reporter=text --reporter=json-summary --reporter=cobertura --reports-dir coverage node --test --test-force-exit --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=junit --test-reporter-destination=junit.xml tests-js/*.mjs && node scripts/normalize_coverage.mjs coverage/cobertura-coverage.xml
